title: Make CI green: fix rust steps and list output parity
description: Fix failing Rust cucumber steps (signatures, duplicates, config fixtures), align list output for local-only/external projects, update ID capture for 6-char display, then run full Black/Ruff/Behave and cargo fmt/clippy/test/coverage until CI is green.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Starting CI stabilization: analyze /tmp/behave.log for Python failures and undefined steps, fix behavior/spec mismatches (project discovery, list output, config errors), run behave/ruff/black/cargo gates, then commit and push.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Work in progress: fixed migration multiple-parents error, removed redundant config reload on create (IssueCreationResult), added Rust daemon test hooks to avoid Unix socket restrictions and updated list/daemon steps. Tests: python3 -m behave (pass), cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml --test cucumber -- --fail-fast (pass), cargo clippy --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings (pass), cargo fmt --check (pass), python3 -m ruff check python/ (pass), python3 -m black --check python/ (pass), python3 tools/check_spec_parity.py (pass), python3 tools/run_specs.py (Python coverage 95.7%, Rust coverage 92.6%).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Resuming work. Updated daemon lifecycle steps and client test helpers; added project dotfile scenarios and beads write error scenarios. Need to finish migration parity, fix remaining coverage gaps, and re-run full quality gates before commit/push.
